mapper.select: SELECT a.author_id as user_id, COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) as article_count, COALESCE(SUM(s.views),0) as view_count, COALESCE(SUM(s.likes),0) as like_count, COALESCE(SUM(s.favorites),0) as favorite_count FROM article a LEFT JOIN article_stats s ON a.id=s.article_id WHERE a.author_id=#{userId} AND a.status='published' GROUP BY a.author_id
